calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-016 precision-to-commitment circuit: dACC precision_commit_ratio
items.notes: Renamed V3-EXQ-530 -> V3-EXQ-530b to bypass runner completed-record skip. V3-EXQ-530 had an ERROR completion record (SIGTERM on ree-cloud-1 2026-05-06T09:28Z); force_rerun flag is not honored by experiment_runner.py which checks runner_status.json independently. Fresh ID bypasses the skip entirely.
